allow: Bash(node -e "require\('./server/db'\); require\('./server/auth'\); require\('./server/middleware/protect'\); console.log\('All modules load OK'\)")

Bash(node -e "const {DatabaseSync}=require\('node-sqlite3-wasm'\);const db=new DatabaseSync\(':memory:'\);db.exec\('CREATE TABLE t\(x\)'\);db.prepare\('INSERT INTO t VALUES\(1\)'\).run\(\);console.log\(db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM t'\).all\(\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {DatabaseSync}=require\('node:sqlite'\);const db=new DatabaseSync\(':memory:'\);db.exec\('CREATE TABLE t\(x INTEGER\)'\);db.prepare\('INSERT INTO t VALUES\(1\)'\).run\(\);console.log\(db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM t'\).all\(\)\)")
